report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Crypto Trading Bots & Telegram Guide 2026 (intermediate, ~3000 words, 529 lines) and Blockchain Oracles & DeFi Price Feeds Guide 2026 (intermediate, ~2800 words, 550 lines), with full SEO metadata, JSON-LD FAQPage schemas, comparison tables, and data page entries.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto Trading Bots: Telegram bots (TrojanBot, GMGN.ai, Maestro, BonkBot, Banana Gun) dominate 2026 trading. Key strategies include sniping, grid trading, copy trading, and DCA automation. Security is critical — $112M lost in first 2 months of 2026, with scam bots and AI deepfake promotions as top threats.

Blockchain Oracles: Chainlink holds 64% market share, Chronicle 11%, Pyth 5.8%, RedStone 5.5%. RedStone is fastest-growing, supporting 110+ chains with $10B TVL secured via EigenLayer restaking. Push vs pull oracle models co-exist. Oracle manipulation remains a major DeFi attack vector (Mango Markets $116M exploit).

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto Trading Bots & Telegram Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering bot types, top Telegram bots comparison, how they work, strategies, security risks, and selection checklist. 6 FAQs. Internal links to 5 related guides.

Blockchain Oracles & DeFi Price Feeds Guide 2026 — 8 sections covering the oracle problem, how oracles work, oracle types, top networks comparison (Chainlink/Pyth/RedStone/Chronicle/API3), DeFi usage, manipulation attacks, and future outlook. 6 FAQs. Internal links to 6 related guides.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Trading Bots page: title tag 'Crypto Trading Bots Guide 2026: Telegram Bots, Strategies & Security | degen0x', target keyword 'crypto trading bots guide 2026', FAQPage + Article schemas, 5 internal links
Oracles page: title tag 'Blockchain Oracles Guide 2026: Chainlink, Pyth, RedStone & Price Feeds | degen0x', target keyword 'blockchain oracles guide 2026', FAQPage + Article schemas, 6 internal links
Both pages include: OpenGraph metadata, Twitter card metadata, structured FAQ schema for rich snippets, breadcrumb navigation, comparison tables for featured snippets

sections.title: Data Files Created
